name: True DELTA VERSE
description: Self-verifying NFT with three layers of truth: visual binary encoding, steganographic payload, and on-chain hash anchoring. Evolution from the original DELTA VERSE (0x024b464ec595f20040002237680026bf006e8f90) from decorative binary to real, verifiable encoding. Each binary digit in the image is meaningful and decodes to: 'DELTA VERSE :: SELF-VERIFYING NFT :: THREE LAYERS OF TRUTH'

attributes.value: DELTA VERSE :: SELF-VERIFYING NFT :: THREE LAYERS OF TRUTH

layer_1.name: Visual Binary Layer
layer_1.description: Read binary digits from coin image rings
layer_1.instruction: Photograph the coin, read 0s and 1s, decode to ASCII text
layer_1.message_encoded: DELTA VERSE :: SELF-VERIFYING NFT :: THREE LAYERS OF TRUTH

layer_2.name: Steganographic Layer
layer_2.description: Hidden payload embedded in JPEG pixels

layer_3.name: On-Chain Hash Layer
layer_3.description: Immutable hash stored in smart contract
layer_3.instruction: Call verifyPostStegHash() with computed image SHA-256

original.description: Original DELTA VERSE with decorative binary

improvement.binary_encoding: Real message instead of random digits
improvement.smart_contract: Custom ERC-1155 with hash verification functions

verify_authenticity: 2. Read visible binary digits from rings (should decode to the message)
3. Extract hidden payload: steghide extract -sf image.jpg
5. Verify hash matches contract.postStegHash via contract call
